title: Create: Warzone
description: The official modpack for the Create: Warzone server. A server where you can build tanks, planes, nations ,and factories to destroy your enemies. Make a friend and build and ever lasting impact.
body:
Create: Warzone is a nation/faction based server, with the primary focus on geopolitics, guns, factories and...Vehicles! Our focus is on the satisfaction of the players, to give them the most fun and freedom as possible.

The modpack primarily contains military and industrial styled mods, like Create, Warium, Valkyrian skies, TACz and computer craft. Which allows players to industrialise their weaponry, arm their nations, and innovate. 

Join our discord if you haven't! Bring a friend! And see you on the battle field soldier!
